questions.question: A shopkeeper sells an article for ₹240 at a profit of 20%. What is the cost price?
If the simple interest on ₹4000 for 3 years at 10% per annum is ₹x, find x.
The LCM of 12, 15, and 20 is:
A train 200 m long passes a pole in 10 seconds. Its speed in km/h is:
If 4x + 3y = 24 and x = 3, then y = ?
The average of 5 consecutive integers starting from 10 is:
A pipe can fill a tank in 12 hours. Another pipe can fill it in 8 hours. How long will they take together?
What is 15% of 240?
In how many ways can 4 boys be seated in a row?
The probability of getting a head in a single toss of a fair coin is:
questions.explanation: A fair coin has 2 equally likely outcomes. P(Head) = 1/2.

questions.question: If A:B = 2:3 and B:C = 4:5, then A:B:C = ?
The area of a circle with radius 7 cm is (use π = 22/7):
The perimeter of a rectangle with length 12 cm and breadth 8 cm is:
What is the square root of 1764?
Two numbers are in ratio 3:5. If their sum is 160, find the larger number.
A man travels 60 km at 30 km/h and 40 km at 20 km/h. His average speed is:
questions.explanation: Total distance = 100 km. Total time = 60/30 + 40/20 = 2 + 2 = 4 hrs. Avg speed = 100/4 = 25 km/h.

questions.question: What is compound interest on ₹1000 at 10% per annum for 2 years?
The HCF of 36 and 48 is:
If 8 men can do a work in 12 days, how many days will 12 men take?
What is 20% of 20% of 500?
A person's age 5 years ago was 35. After 10 years, his age will be:
The value of (√64 + √36) is:
A discount of 20% is offered on a shirt costing ₹500. What is the selling price?
If ΔABC is right-angled at B with AB=3, BC=4, find AC.
questions.explanation: By Pythagoras: AC² = AB² + BC² = 9 + 16 = 25. AC = 5.

questions.question: A sum of money doubles itself in 8 years at simple interest. The rate of interest is:
questions.explanation: If P doubles, SI = P. P = P×R×8/100 → R = 100/8 = 12.5%.

questions.question: The volume of a cube with side 5 cm is:
Express 3/4 as a percentage.
Two trains of 120 m and 80 m are running in opposite directions at 40 km/h and 50 km/h. Time to cross each other:
questions.explanation: Relative speed = 90 km/h = 25 m/s. Total distance = 200 m. Time = 200/25 = 8 seconds. (Wait: 8 sec) → 8 seconds.

questions.question: In a class, 60% of students passed in Math and 70% in English. If 10% failed in both, what % passed in both?
questions.explanation: Passed in at least one = 100 – 10 = 90%. By inclusion-exclusion: 60+70 – both = 90 → both = 40%.

questions.question: What is the next number in the pattern: 1, 4, 9, 16, 25, ?
